hero.label: Digital Growth Partner for SMEs
hero.sub: Eden-Core builds conversion-focused websites, modern web applications, and digital systems that turn your online presence into a measurable business asset. Based in Switzerland. Built for growth.

services.label: What We Do
services.subtitle: From your first professional website to complex web applications — Eden-Core delivers the digital infrastructure your business needs to grow.

items.title: Website Development
items.description: Conversion-focused websites built for speed, clarity, and business results. From local service businesses to professional firms — designed to generate enquiries, not just impressions.

items.title: Web Applications & Dashboards
items.description: Custom web applications and internal dashboards when your business needs more than a website. Built with React and modern architecture — scalable, fast, and maintainable.

items.title: AI Chatbot Integration
items.description: Add an intelligent AI assistant to your website that handles customer enquiries, qualifies leads, and answers questions 24/7 — reducing manual workload while improving visitor experience.

items.title: Digital Presence & Consulting
items.description: Strategic guidance on your digital positioning — from Google Business optimisation and local SEO to structured advice on how to attract and convert more customers online.

items.title: Maintenance & Support
items.description: Ongoing monthly partnerships that keep your digital presence current, secure, and improving. Performance monitoring, updates, and regular analytics reports included.

why.label: Why Eden-Core
why.desc: Most SMEs hire a developer and get a website. Eden-Core delivers a strategic digital system — designed to attract customers, build trust, and grow with your business over time.

items.title: Strategy Before Code
items.description: Every project starts with understanding your business goals, target customers, and competitive context. We build what makes strategic sense — not just what looks nice.

items.title: Premium Design Standard
items.description: Your website is your first impression. Eden-Core applies the same design principles used by leading tech companies to make your SME look credible and professional from day one.

items.title: Scalable Technical Foundation
items.description: Clean, maintainable code that can grow with your business. No bloated plugins or fragile setups — just solid fundamentals that support long-term digital development.

items.title: Conversion-Focused Execution
items.description: Every design decision is measured against one question: does this make visitors more likely to contact you? Structure, copy, and UX all serve your business objectives.

items.title: Clear, Direct Communication
items.description: No project ambiguity, no hidden scope creep. Eden-Core operates with structured proposals, documented deliverables, and professional communication throughout.

items.title: Long-Term Partnership Model
items.description: We don't disappear after launch. Monthly partnerships mean your digital presence keeps improving — with performance monitoring, updates, and ongoing optimisation.

process.label: How We Work
process.subtitle: From first conversation to live website — every step is structured, transparent, and focused on delivering value.

steps.title: Consultation
steps.description: We start with a free discovery call to understand your business, goals, and current digital situation. No pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: Strategy & Structure
steps.description: We define the sitemap, user flow, and strategic direction. Every page and element is planned to serve your business goals.

steps.title: Design Direction
steps.description: Visual direction, typography, and brand alignment are established. You approve the concept before a single line of code is written.

steps.title: Development
steps.description: Clean, fast, and well-structured code. Built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript — or React when the project calls for it. Optimised for performance from the start.

steps.title: Launch
steps.description: We handle hosting, domain configuration, Google Business setup, and go-live checks. Your business launches with everything connected and working.

steps.title: Ongoing Support
steps.description: Monthly partnership clients receive regular performance reviews, updates, SEO improvements, and direct access to Eden-Core for questions and changes.

packages.label: Solutions
packages.subtitle: Every project is scoped individually. These packages reflect typical starting configurations — final pricing is discussed after your consultation.
packages.note: All packages include a structured proposal, clear scope, and professional contract. Hybrid pricing (reduced upfront + monthly) available on request.

items.name: Starter Website
items.description: A fast, professional website for local service businesses ready to establish a credible online presence.

items.name: Business Website
items.description: A lead-focused website built for established SMEs that want to actively convert visitors into customers.

items.name: Conversion-Focused Website
items.description: Advanced website with custom integrations, booking systems, and a full digital presence setup for maximum results.

items.name: Custom Digital Solution
items.description: Web applications, dashboards, AI chatbot integration, or bespoke digital systems tailored to your business logic.

ai.label: AI Integration
ai.desc: Eden-Core can integrate an intelligent AI chatbot into any website we build or manage. Your visitors get instant answers, and you receive qualified enquiries — not noise.
ai.addon_note: Available as an add-on to any project
ai.chat_msg1: Hi! I'm the digital assistant for this business. How can I help you today?
ai.chat_msg3: We specialise in website design, maintenance, and local SEO. Would you like to book a free consultation?

use_cases.title: Customer Support
use_cases.description: Answers frequently asked questions instantly, 24 hours a day — without you lifting a finger.

use_cases.title: Lead Qualification
use_cases.description: Captures visitor intent and qualifies enquiries before they reach your inbox or phone.

use_cases.title: Booking Assistance
use_cases.description: Guides visitors toward booking a consultation or service appointment directly from your site.

use_cases.title: Instant Responses
use_cases.description: Responds to product or service questions in seconds — keeping potential customers engaged.

cta.label: Start Your Project
cta.desc: Whether you need a professional website, a custom web application, or a long-term digital growth partner — Eden-Core is ready to scope your project and deliver real results.

footer.tagline: Digital growth partner for small and medium-sized enterprises. Websites, web applications, and ongoing digital support — built in Switzerland.

privacy.subtitle: Legal
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1_p1: Protecting your personal data is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains how Eden-Core collects, uses, and protects personal information when you visit our website or contact us.
privacy.s1_p2: By using this website, you agree to the practices described in this policy.
privacy.s3_collect_intro: We may collect personal data when you:
privacy.s4_p1: Our website uses cookies and similar technologies to improve user experience, analyze website traffic, and optimize our services.
privacy.s4_p2: Cookies are small text files stored on your device.
privacy.s4_p3: You can control or disable cookies through your browser settings.
privacy.s4_p4: Please note that disabling cookies may affect certain website functionalities.
privacy.s5_p1: This website uses Google Analytics, a web analytics service provided by Google LLC.
privacy.s5_p2: Google Analytics uses cookies to analyze how visitors use the website. Information generated by these cookies may include:
privacy.s5_p3: IP anonymization may be enabled where applicable.
privacy.s5_p4: The information collected may be transmitted to and stored on servers operated by Google.
privacy.s5_p5: You can prevent the collection of data by Google Analytics by:
s5_prevent: using browser extensions that block tracking technologies
privacy.s6_p1: If you contact us via contact form or email, the information you provide will be stored for the purpose of processing your request and potential follow-up communication.
privacy.s6_p2: We do not sell personal data to third parties.
privacy.s7_p1: Our website may be hosted through third-party infrastructure providers. Technical data such as IP addresses, browser information, and server logs may be processed for security and operational purposes.
privacy.s7_p2: We work with providers that implement appropriate security measures.
privacy.s8_p1: Personal data is retained only as long as necessary for the purposes described in this policy or as required by applicable law.
privacy.s9_intro: Depending on applicable law, you may have the right to:
s9_rights: request access to your personal data
privacy.s9_p2: Requests can be submitted via email.
privacy.s10_p1: We implement reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect personal data against unauthorized access, loss, misuse, or disclosure.
privacy.s10_p2: However, no method of online transmission or storage is completely secure.
privacy.s11_p1: Our website may contain links to external websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of third-party websites.
privacy.s12_p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect legal, technical, or operational changes.
privacy.s12_p2: The latest version published on this website shall apply.
privacy.s13_p1: For questions regarding this Privacy Policy or data protection matters, please contact:

notice.subtitle: Impressum
notice.title: Legal Notice
notice.s3_p1: The content of this website has been created with the greatest possible care. However, we do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the information provided.
notice.s3_p2: Liability claims against Eden-Core for material or immaterial damages resulting from access to, use of, or non-use of the published information are excluded.
notice.s4_p1: This website may contain links to third-party websites. We assume no responsibility for the content of external websites. The operators of the linked websites are solely responsible for their content.
notice.s5_p1: All content, images, designs, text, and files published on this website are subject to copyright and other intellectual property laws.
notice.s5_p2: Any use, reproduction, or distribution without prior written consent from Eden-Core is prohibited.

terms.subtitle: Legal
terms.title: General Terms & Conditions
terms.acceptance: By commissioning Eden-Core, the client accepts these GTC.

sections.title: Scope
sections.content: These General Terms and Conditions (GTC) apply to all services, offers, projects, and ongoing partnerships provided by Eden-Core to its clients.

sections.title: Services
list: Development of digital platforms and applications
Ongoing digital partnerships and retainer services

sections.title: Offers and Contract Formation
sections.content: Offers provided by Eden-Core are non-binding unless explicitly stated otherwise. A contract is formed by written confirmation, acceptance of an offer, electronic consent, or commencement of project work by Eden-Core.

sections.title: Pricing and Payment Terms
sections.content: All prices are stated in Swiss Francs (CHF) unless otherwise specified. Standard payment structure:
list: Additional milestone payments depending on project progress
Final payment before launch or final handover
sections.footer: Recurring services and retainers are invoiced monthly in advance. Invoices are payable within 30 days without deduction unless otherwise agreed.

sections.title: Client Responsibilities
sections.content: The client agrees to provide all required materials, information, and access credentials in a timely manner. The client is solely responsible for the legality of all provided content.

sections.title: Project Process and Acceptance
sections.content: After completion, the client is given the opportunity to review the agreed services. Unless substantial defects are reported in writing within 7 days, the services shall be deemed accepted.

sections.title: Intellectual Property and Usage Rights
sections.content: All rights to concepts, designs, source code, graphics, texts, and developments remain with Eden-Core until full payment has been received. After full payment, the client receives the agreed usage rights.

sections.title: Third-Party Providers and External Services
sections.content: Eden-Core may work with third-party providers and external platforms. Eden-Core assumes no liability for outages, failures, or security issues caused by third-party providers.

sections.title: Liability
sections.content: Eden-Core is only liable for damages caused intentionally or through gross negligence. Liability for indirect damages, data loss, or loss of profit is excluded.

sections.title: Availability and Maintenance
sections.content: Uninterrupted or permanent availability cannot be guaranteed.

sections.title: Data Protection
sections.content: The processing of personal data is governed by Eden-Core's separate Privacy Policy.

sections.title: Termination of Ongoing Services
sections.content: Unless otherwise agreed, a notice period of 30 days to the end of a month applies.

sections.title: Final Provisions
sections.content: Swiss law shall apply exclusively. The place of jurisdiction is Lucerne, Switzerland.
